name: nomeo-theme
description: Nomeo — travel eSIM Shopify theme. Built on Dawn, restyled with Tailwind v4 + Vite.

scripts.push:dev: npm run build && shopify theme push -e development --unpublished
scripts.push:prod: npm run build && shopify theme push -e production
scripts.clean: rm -rf assets layout/theme.liquid layout/password.liquid sections snippets templates config locales
